entries.definition: Food or other objects used to attract fish, animals, or people into a trap or to lure them; something used to entice or tempt.
entries.exampleSentence: He used worms as bait to catch trout.

entries.definition: To lure or entice someone or something, often by offering a reward or provocation; to put bait on a hook or in a trap.
entries.exampleSentence: They baited the trap with cheese.
